Description: Student repeatedly talking out of turn and refusing to follow redirection during math class.
Response_Action: Teacher-student conference

Description: Pushing match between two students during hallway transition. No injuries reported.
Response_Action: Restorative circle with both students

Description: Student refused to put away cell phone after multiple requests and used disrespectful language toward teacher.
Response_Action: Office referral and parent conference

Description: Student threw materials off desk during reading group after becoming frustrated with assignment.
Response_Action: Calm-down space and teacher check-in

Description: Student kicked another student during soccer game dispute. Minor bruise on victim's shin.
Response_Action: Restorative conference and recess plan

Description: Repeated name-calling and exclusion of peer from lunch group. Third report this month from target student's parent.
Response_Action: Formal bullying investigation and intervention plan

Description: Student making inappropriate noises during silent reading. Continued after teacher redirect.
Response_Action: Teacher-student conference and behavior chart

Description: Student refused to participate in PE class and sat on bleachers using phone. Argumentative when approached.
Response_Action: Parent conference and phone policy review

Description: Student crying and refusing to participate after disagreement with peer during partner work.
Response_Action: Counselor check-in and social skills lesson

Description: Student shoved peer into lockers after verbal argument. No injuries. Both students upset about social media conflict from weekend.
Response_Action: In-school suspension and restorative conference

Description: Student intentionally broke classroom supplies (markers and ruler) during frustration with group project.
Response_Action: Replacement plan and behavior support meeting

Description: Student making fun of peer's clothing repeatedly over multiple days. Reported by bystander.
Response_Action: Restorative circle and parent meeting

Description: Student walked out of classroom without permission after disagreement about grade on assignment.
Response_Action: De-escalation with counselor and teacher conference

Description: Passing notes with inappropriate content during science class. Continued after initial warning.
Response_Action: Teacher-student conference and parent notification

Description: Fight between three students during basketball game. One student received minor scrape. All students escalated quickly.
Response_Action: 1-day out of school suspension for initiator; restorative conference for all

Description: Student screaming and crying after losing turn in classroom game. Took 20 minutes to de-escalate.
Response_Action: Counselor support and behavior intervention plan discussion

Description: Student accessing inappropriate websites during computer class. Attempted to clear browser history.
Response_Action: Technology privilege restriction and parent conference

Description: Student caught sharing answers during science test via notes passed to peer.
Response_Action: Zero on assessment and academic integrity conversation

Description: Student bit peer during carpet time disagreement. Skin not broken.
Response_Action: Parent conference and behavior support plan

Description: Student refused to complete work and put head down. When asked to step into hall for conversation used profanity.
Response_Action: Office referral and restorative conference

Description: Student making racist comments to peer about food brought from home. Peer was visibly upset.
Response_Action: Formal investigation; family meeting; anti-bias lesson for class

Description: Student repeatedly out of seat and distracting peers during independent work time.
Response_Action: Seating change and behavior chart with incentives

Description: Two students in physical fight after school near pickup area. One student had bloody nose.
Response_Action: 2-day out of school suspension for both; mandatory family conference

Description: Cyberbullying reported - student created fake social media account mocking peer. Screenshots provided by parent.
Response_Action: Technology restriction; restorative process; ongoing counseling

Description: Student throwing small objects (erasers) at peers during writing time. Hit one student in the eye (no injury).
Response_Action: Behavior support plan revision and parent meeting

Description: Student refused to remove headphones and participate in class discussion. Escalated to yelling when teacher collected headphones.
Response_Action: De-escalation with counselor; belongings policy review

Description: Graffiti found in boys bathroom. Student identified through witness accounts.
Response_Action: Cleaning restitution and parent conference

Description: Student consistently arriving late to class (4th time this month) and disrupting instruction upon entry.
Response_Action: Attendance intervention and schedule review

Description: Student pushed peer off playground equipment after argument over turns. Peer scraped knee.
Response_Action: Restorative conversation and recess buddy system

Description: Student making disruptive sounds and gestures to make classmates laugh during lesson. Continued after warnings.
Response_Action: Teacher-student conference and parent notification

Description: Student threw food at peer group. Escalated to shoving when confronted. Multiple students involved.
Response_Action: 1-day ISS for primary student; restorative lunch group

Description: Student spreading rumors about peer and organizing exclusion from recess games. Pattern reported by multiple students.
Response_Action: Friendship mediation and class community circle

Description: Student used AI chatbot to complete entire essay assignment. Admitted when confronted with evidence.
Response_Action: Redo assignment; academic integrity lesson for class

Description: Student running around classroom and climbing on furniture. Not responding to verbal redirections.
Response_Action: Safety plan and OT referral discussion with family

Description: Student crumpled up test paper and threw it in recycling saying the test was stupid. Refused to retrieve it.
Response_Action: Restorative conversation and assessment retake opportunity

Description: Student body-shaming peer in hallway. Multiple witnesses. Target student went to nurse feeling sick.
Response_Action: Formal bullying report; counseling for both; parent meetings

Description: Student repeatedly tapping desk and humming during standardized testing. Distracting to nearby students.
Response_Action: Alternate testing location arranged; sensory tools provided

Description: Student hit peer with jump rope during recess disagreement. Red mark on peer's arm.
Response_Action: Restorative conference and structured recess plan

Description: End of year senioritis - student sleeping in class daily and refusing to engage. Third referral this quarter.
Response_Action: Family meeting; credit recovery plan; counselor check-ins

Description: Student having emotional breakdown during class related to peer conflict. Crying and unable to participate for extended period.
Response_Action: Counselor support and peer mediation scheduled
